title: Anime Character Blueprint Sheet

imagePrompts.prompt: {"type":"character design blueprint sheet","style":"technical concept art, black blueprint background with faint square grid, thin white line art, minimalist monochrome drafting aesthetic","subject":{"category":"anime-inspired male character head turnaround","name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"MALE_01\"}","gender_presentation":"male","age_appearance":"young adult","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"black\"}","style":"short spiky layered hair with sharp jagged strands, dense volume at the crown, tapered sides and back"},"eyes":{"color":"{argument name=\"eye color\" default=\"brown\"}"},"accessories":{"earrings":"small studs in both ears"},"clothing":{"top":"high-collar structured jacket, open slightly at the front, clean angular seams"},"tattoos":["cross on right cheek","floral tattoo climbing the left side of the neck"]},"layout":{"orientation":"portrait sheet","sections":[{"title":"front view main portrait","position":"left large panel","count":1,"details":"large head-and-shoulders front view with neck tattoo visible above the raised collar, ears visible, dimension line showing width 160 and vertical height 220"},{"title":"01 | SIDE VIEW","position":"upper right panel","count":1,"details":"right-facing side profile, collar visible, width measurement 100"},{"title":"02 | BACK VIEW","position":"middle right panel","count":1,"details":"back of head and upper shoulders, centerline shown, width measurement 160"},{"title":"03 | NECK TATTOO DETAIL","position":"bottom center-left inset","count":1,"details":"close-up inset of the floral neck tattoo beside the jawline and collar"},{"title":"NOTES:","position":"bottom right","count":4,"labels":["HAIR: SPIKED, BLACK","EYES: BROWN","TATTOOS: CROSS (RIGHT CHEEK) FLORAL (LEFT NECK)","EARRINGS: BOTH EARS"]}],"header":{"top_left":["SUBJECT: {argument name=\"subject code\" default=\"MALE_01\"}","CLASS: CHARACTER DESIGN","STATUS: APPROVED"],"top_right":["DATE: {argument name=\"date\" default=\"05/20/2024\"}","SCALE: 1:1"]},"legend":{"bottom_left":["UNIT: mm","OUTLINE","CONSTRUCTION","CENTERLINE"]}},"composition":"clean drafting-page layout with thin panel borders, measurement arrows, center guides, and blueprint annotation typography; all text in crisp white uppercase sans-serif","color_palette":{"background":"black","lines":"white","grid":"dark gray","accents":"none"}}

promptTranslations.zh: {"type":"角色设计蓝图页","style":"技术概念艺术，黑色蓝图背景配浅色方格网，白色细线稿，极简单色绘图美学","subject":{"category":"动漫风格男性角色头部三视图","name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"MALE_01\"}","gender_presentation":"男性","age_appearance":"青年","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"黑色\"}","style":"短尖刺层次发型，发丝尖锐，头顶发量密集，侧面和后部修剪整齐"},"eyes":{"color":"{argument name=\"eye color\" default=\"棕色\"}"},"accessories":{"earrings":"双耳小耳钉"},"clothing":{"top":"高领结构化夹克，前部微开，干净的棱角接缝"},"tattoos":["右脸颊十字架","左侧颈部攀爬花卉纹身"]},"layout":{"orientation":"纵向页面","sections":[{"title":"正面主肖像","position":"左侧大面板","count":1,"details":"大型头部和肩部正面视图，高领上方可见颈部纹身，耳朵可见，尺寸线显示宽度160，垂直高度220"},{"title":"01 | 侧视图","position":"右上方面板","count":1,"details":"右侧侧面轮廓，领口可见，宽度测量100"},{"title":"02 | 后视图","position":"中右方面板","count":1,"details":"头部和上肩部后视图，显示中心线，宽度测量160"},{"title":"03 | 颈部纹身细节","position":"底部中左侧插图","count":1,"details":"下颌线和领口旁边的花卉颈部纹身特写插图"},{"title":"备注：","position":"右下方","count":4,"labels":["头发：尖刺，黑色","眼睛：棕色","纹身：十字架（右脸颊），花卉（左颈部）","耳环：双耳"]}],"header":{"top_left":["主题：{argument name=\"subject code\" default=\"MALE_01\"}","类别：角色设计","状态：已批准"],"top_right":["日期：{argument name=\"date\" default=\"05/20/2024\"}","比例：1:1"]},"legend":{"bottom_left":["单位：mm","轮廓","结构","中心线"]}},"composition":"干净的绘图页面布局，带有细面板边框、测量箭头、中心引导线和蓝图注释排版；所有文字均为清晰的白色大写无衬线字体","color_palette":{"background":"黑色","lines":"白色","grid":"深灰色","accents":"无"}}
promptTranslations.fr: {"type":"fiche de conception de personnage","style":"art conceptuel technique, fond de plan noir avec grille carrée légère, dessin au trait blanc fin, esthétique de dessin monochrome minimaliste","subject":{"category":"vue de face et profil de personnage masculin inspiré de l'anime","name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"MALE_01\"}","gender_presentation":"masculin","age_appearance":"jeune adulte","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"noir\"}","style":"cheveux courts en épis avec des mèches dégradées et acérées, volume dense au sommet, côtés et arrière effilés"},"eyes":{"color":"{argument name=\"eye color\" default=\"marron\"}"},"accessories":{"earrings":"petits clous aux deux oreilles"},"clothing":{"top":"veste structurée à col haut, légèrement ouverte sur le devant, coutures angulaires nettes"},"tattoos":["croix sur la joue droite","tatouage floral remontant sur le côté gauche du cou"]},"layout":{"orientation":"fiche portrait","sections":[{"title":"portrait principal de face","position":"panneau gauche large","count":1,"details":"grand portrait de face tête et épaules avec tatouage de cou visible au-dessus du col relevé, oreilles visibles, ligne de dimension indiquant largeur 160 et hauteur verticale 220"},{"title":"01 | VUE DE PROFIL","position":"panneau supérieur droit","count":1,"details":"profil droit, col visible, mesure de largeur 100"},{"title":"02 | VUE DE DOS","position":"panneau central droit","count":1,"details":"arrière de la tête et haut des épaules, ligne centrale indiquée, mesure de largeur 160"},{"title":"03 | DÉTAIL TATOUAGE COU","position":"encart inférieur centre-gauche","count":1,"details":"gros plan en médaillon du tatouage floral du cou à côté de la mâchoire et du col"},{"title":"NOTES :","position":"en bas à droite","count":4,"labels":["CHEVEUX : EN ÉPIS, NOIRS","YEUX : MARRON","TATOUAGES : CROIX (JOUE DROITE) FLORAL (COU GAUCHE)","BOUCLES D'OREILLES : AUX DEUX OREILLES"]}],"header":{"top_left":["SUJET : {argument name=\"subject code\" default=\"MALE_01\"}","CLASSE : CONCEPTION DE PERSONNAGE","STATUT : APPROUVÉ"],"top_right":["DATE : {argument name=\"date\" default=\"20/05/2024\"}","ÉCHELLE : 1:1"]},"legend":{"bottom_left":["UNITÉ : mm","CONTOUR","CONSTRUCTION","LIGNE CENTRALE"]}},"composition":"mise en page propre de type dessin technique avec bordures de panneaux fines, flèches de mesure, guides centraux et typographie d'annotation de plan ; tout le texte est en majuscules sans empattement blanc net","color_palette":{"background":"noir","lines":"blanc","grid":"gris foncé","accents":"aucun"}}

promptTranslations.pt: {"type":"folha de projeto de design de personagem","style":"arte conceitual técnica, fundo de projeto azul (blueprint) com grade quadrada tênue, arte de linha branca fina, default=\"MALE_01\"}","gender_presentation":"masculino","age_appearance":"jovem adulto","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"preto\"}","style":"cabelo curto espetado em camadas com mechas pontiagudas, volume denso no topo, laterais e nuca afiladas"},"eyes":{"color":"{argument name=\"eye color\" default=\"castanho\"}"},"accessories":{"earrings":"pequenos brincos em ambas as orelhas"},"clothing":{"top":"jaqueta estruturada de gola alta, levemente aberta na frente, costuras angulares limpas"},"tattoos":["cruz na bochecha direita","tatuagem floral subindo pelo lado esquerdo do pescoço"]},"layout":{"orientation":"folha retrato","sections":[{"title":"retrato principal vista frontal","position":"painel grande esquerdo","count":1,"details":"retrato grande de cabeça e ombros vista frontal com tatuagem no pescoço visível acima da gola levantada, orelhas visíveis, linha de dimensão mostrando largura 160 e altura vertical 220"},{"title":"01 | VISTA LATERAL","position":"painel superior direito","count":1,"details":"perfil lateral virado para a direita, gola visível, medida de largura 100"},{"title":"02 | VISTA TRASEIRA","position":"painel central centro-esquerda","count":1,"details":"inserção em close da tatuagem floral no pescoço ao lado da linha do maxilar e da gola"},{"title":"NOTAS:","position":"inferior direito","count":4,"labels":["CABELO: ESPETADO, PRETO","OLHOS: CASTANHO","TATUAGENS: CRUZ (BOCHECHA DIREITA) FLORAL (PESCOÇO ESQUERDO)","BRINCOS: AMBAS AS ORELHAS"]}],"header":{"top_left":["ASSUNTO: {argument name=\"subject code\" default=\"MALE_01\"}","CLASSE: DESIGN DE PERSONAGEM","STATUS: APROVADO"],"top_right":["DATA: {argument name=\"date\" default=\"20/05/2024\"}","ESCALA: 1:1"]},"legend":{"bottom_left":["UNIDADE: mm","CONTORNO","CONSTRUÇÃO","LINHA CENTRAL"]}},"composition":"layout de página de desenho técnico limpo com bordas de painel finas, setas de medição, guias promptTranslations.ja: {"type":"キャラクターデザイン設計図シート","style":"テクニカルコンセプトアート、黒い設計図背景に薄い方眼グリッド、細い白線画、ミニマルなモノクロ製図美学","subject":{"category":"アニメ風男性キャラクターの頭部三面図","name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"MALE_01\"}","gender_presentation":"男性","age_appearance":"青年","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"black\"}","style":"鋭いギザギザの毛束を持つショートスパイキーレイヤー、頭頂部にボリュームがあり、サイドとバックは刈り上げ"},"eyes":{"color":"{argument name=\"eye color\" default=\"brown\"}"},"accessories":{"earrings":"両耳に小さなスタッドピアス"},"clothing":{"top":"ハイカラーの構築的なジャケット、フロントは少し開いており、クリーンで角張った縫い目"},"tattoos":["右頬に十字架","首の左側に這い上がる花のタトゥー"]},"layout":{"orientation":"縦型シート","sections":[{"title":"正面メインポートレート","position":"左側の大きなパネル","count":1,"details":"首のタトゥーが立ち襟の上に見える頭部と肩の大きな正面図、耳が見える、幅160と高さ220を示す寸法線"},{"title":"01 | 側面図","position":"右上パネル","count":1,"details":"右向きの横顔、襟が見える、幅測定値100"},{"title":"02 | 背面図","position":"中右パネル","count":1,"details":"後頭部と肩上部、中心線を表示、幅測定値160"},{"title":"03 | 首のタトゥー詳細","position":"下部中央左のインセット","count":1,"details":"顎のラインと襟の横にある花の首タトゥーのクローズアップ"},{"title":"NOTES:","position":"右下","count":4,"labels":["髪：スパイキー、黒","目：茶色","タトゥー：十字架（右頬）、花（左首）","ピアス：両耳"]}],"header":{"top_left":["SUBJECT: {argument name=\"subject code\" default=\"MALE_01\"}","CLASS: キャラクターデザイン","STATUS: 承認済み"],"top_right":["DATE: {argument name=\"date\" default=\"2024/05/20\"}","SCALE: 1:1"]},"legend":{"bottom_left":["UNIT: mm","アウトライン","構造","中心線"]}},"composition":"細いパネル枠、測定矢印、中心ガイド、設計図用注釈タイポグラフィを備えたクリーンな製図レイアウト。すべてのテキストはくっきりとした白い大文字のサンセリフ体","color_palette":{"background":"黒","lines":"白","grid":"ダークグレー","accents":"なし"}}
